behavior_summary: This script defines two small processes for an item: a U8P_MOREFISH::look (examine) handler and a U8P_MOREFISH::use (consume) handler.
U8P_MOREFISH::look: when the player examines the item, the item emits a short bark "fish " and then the examine process suspends/ends.

U8P_MOREFISH::use: when the player uses/consumes the item, it plays a short bark "Mmmm... ", destroys the item instance (Item::destroy(this)), and calls FeedAvatar(0x02) to apply a consumption effect to the avatar.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MOREFISH::look: immediate bark then suspend — minimal examine-only flow (no branches, no external calls).
U8P_MOREFISH::use: sequential consume flow: play bark -> Item::destroy(this) -> FeedAvatar(0x02).
open_questions: What specific effect does FeedAvatar(0x02) apply to the avatar (restores hunger, health, or another resource)? (confidence: medium)
Is the item intended to represent a fish/food item (bark text 'fish ') or is that label symbolic? (confidence: low)
Are there any inventory or quest-side effects elsewhere tied to using/destroying this item that are not visible in this snippet? (confidence: low)

main_function.name: U8P_MOREFISH::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/description response for the item by emitting the bark "fish " and then suspending the U8P_MOREFISH::look process.
entry_conditions: Player performs the 'U8P_MOREFISH::look' (examine) action on the item / engine invokes the U8P_MOREFISH::look process for this item

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFISH::look
function_map.role: examine handler — emits a short description/bark and ends the U8P_MOREFISH::look process

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFISH::use
function_map.role: U8P_MOREFISH::use/consume handler — plays eat-sound text, removes the item, and applies a feed effect to the avatar

external_calls.purpose: Remove/delete this specific item instance from the world/inventory after it is consumed.
Apply a consumption/feeding effect to the avatar; called with argument 0x02 (effect TYPE inferred).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script defines two small processes for an item: a U8P_MOREFISH::look (examine) handler and a U8P_MOREFISH::use (consume) handler.
